---
pagetitle: "Subscribe · Rabat Review of Books"
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="rrb-container">

<div class="listing-page-title">
  <div class="eyebrow">◆ Join the Review</div>
  <h1>Subscribe</h1>
  <div class="dek">A fortnightly letter, and an invitation to read with us.</div>
</div>

<div style="max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto;">

<p style="font-family:'EB Garamond',serif; font-size:1.15em; line-height:1.7; text-align:center; color:#333; margin-bottom:2.5em;">The Review is free to read. It is sustained by readers who care about a certain kind of attention to literature — and by the quiet, old-fashioned conviction that a good essay is still worth an evening.</p>

<div class="rrb-tier">
  <div class="rrb-tier-head">
    <div class="rrb-tier-name">The Letter</div>
    <div class="rrb-tier-price">Free</div>
  </div>
  <p>Our fortnightly editorial letter, delivered to your inbox. New essays, notes from the editors, and one poem each issue.</p>
  <form onsubmit="event.preventDefault(); alert('Thank you for subscribing (demo).');">
    <input type="email" placeholder="your.email@example.com" required/>
    <button type="submit">Subscribe to the Letter</button>
  </form>
</div>

<div class="rrb-tier rrb-tier-highlight">
  <div class="rrb-tier-head">
    <div class="rrb-tier-name">Friend of the Review</div>
    <div class="rrb-tier-price">$60 <span>/ year</span></div>
  </div>
  <p>Everything in The Letter, plus: early access to new essays, a printed broadsheet twice a year, and an invitation to our annual reading in Rabat.</p>
  <a class="rrb-tier-btn" href="mailto:editors@rabatreview.org?subject=Friend%20of%20the%20Review">Become a Friend</a>
</div>

<div class="rrb-tier">
  <div class="rrb-tier-head">
    <div class="rrb-tier-name">Patron</div>
    <div class="rrb-tier-price">$250 <span>/ year</span></div>
  </div>
  <p>All of the above, plus: an acknowledgement in the masthead, a complete annual set of printed editions, and the editors' quiet gratitude.</p>
  <a class="rrb-tier-btn" href="mailto:editors@rabatreview.org?subject=Patron">Become a Patron</a>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<style>
.rrb-tier {
  background: #fbfaf6;
  border: 1px solid #e0ddd4;
  border-top: 3px solid #111;
  padding: 2em 2em 2.2em;
  margin: 1.2em 0;
}
.rrb-tier-highlight {
  border-top-color: #a02024;
  background: #fff8f4;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 0 rgba(160,32,36,0.06);
}
.rrb-tier-head {
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:baseline;
  padding-bottom:0.6em;
  margin-bottom:0.8em;
  border-bottom:1px solid #e0ddd4;
}
.rrb-tier-name {
  font-family:"Playfair Display", Georgia, serif;
  font-size:1.6em;
  font-weight:800;
  color:#111;
}
.rrb-tier-price {
  font-family:"Playfair Display", Georgia, serif;
  font-size:1.4em;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#a02024;
}
.rrb-tier-price span {
  font-size:0.55em;
  color:#888;
  font-weight:500;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
}
.rrb-tier p {
  font-family:"EB Garamond",serif;
  font-size:1.05em;
  line-height:1.6;
  color:#444;
  margin-bottom:1.2em;
}
.rrb-tier form {
  display:flex;
  gap:0.5em;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.rrb-tier input[type=email] {
  flex:1 1 200px;
  padding:0.75em 1em;
  font-family:"EB Garamond",serif;
  font-size:1em;
  border:1px solid #d0cdc4;
  background:#fff;
}
.rrb-tier button, .rrb-tier-btn {
  font-family:"Inter",sans-serif;
  font-size:0.78em;
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:0.15em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:0.85em 1.6em;
  background:#111;
  color:#fff;
  border:none;
  cursor:pointer;
  display:inline-block;
  text-decoration:none;
  transition:background 0.15s;
}
.rrb-tier button:hover, .rrb-tier-btn:hover {
  background:#a02024;
  color:#fff;
  border:none;
}
</style>
```
